sub_modules.fft_sign_extend: Combinational sign extension from input sample width to internal FFT datapath width.
sub_modules.fft_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier for twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft_twiddle_rom: Combinational twiddle factor lookup interface for FFT stages.
sub_modules.fft_radix2_stage: Combinational FFT pipeline stage wrapper using twiddle multiplication.
